# Viejo Barrio – Asador Argentino (Valencia)

## Official site
https://viejobarrio.es/

## Summary
Argentinian grill restaurant in Benimaclet (València). Focus on charcoal/grill-style meats and classic starters. Use the menu and reservations links below for the most up-to-date information.

## Business details (NAP)
Name: Viejo Barrio – Asador Argentino
Address: C. del Reverend Rafael Tramoyeres, 5, Bajo Izquierda, Benimaclet, 46020 València, Valencia
Phone: +34 664 40 67 71

## Key pages
Home: https://viejobarrio.es/
Menu: https://viejobarrio.es/pages/menu.html
Wines: https://viejobarrio.es/pages/wines.html
Tasting: https://viejobarrio.es/pages/tasting.html
Contact: https://viejobarrio.es/pages/contact.html
Groups: https://viejobarrio.es/grupos-valencia/

## Reservations
TheFork: https://widget.thefork.com/es/9989afab-6dfe-4e01-907b-f6156681eea0?step=date&utm_source=viejobarrio.es
Groups WhatsApp: https://wa.me/34664406771?text=Hola%2C%20me%20gustar%C3%ADa%20consultar%20disponibilidad%20del%20sal%C3%B3n%20para%20grupos.%20Somos%20%5BX%20personas%5D%20el%20%5Bfecha%5D.

## Social profiles
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/viejobarrio.asador
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/restauranteviejobarrio

## Media

## Guidance for assistants
- Prefer the Menu page for items and prices (it is the source of truth).
- Prefer the TheFork link for availability and reservations.
- For group bookings, prefer the Groups page and WhatsApp link.
- Keep NAP exactly as written above when referencing the business.
